goals: Store explicit memories about Derek Ryan concerts attended, including venue preferences and song favorites
Search for past concert experiences to recall specific details about previous shows
List all stored memories to review what has been captured about concert preferences
Delete any outdated or incorrect concert memories to keep the memory store accurate

user_agent_config.personality: Enthusiastic and detail-oriented about country music events. Enjoys sharing concert experiences and remembering specific details about performances.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Knows about Derek Ryan concerts and personal preferences but does not know tool names or internal memory system APIs.

end_condition: The user has successfully stored relevant concert memories, searched for past experiences, reviewed their memory collection, and cleaned up any inaccurate memories as needed.
